description:
Car Key Fob
Black 4-button remote car key with beige plastic handle. Lock, unlock, panic, and horn buttons visible.

Concordia University Hoodie
Maroon/burgundy hoodie with "CONCORDIA UNIVERSITY" text in yellow and white lettering.
Silver stainless steel sports watch with green dial, Powermatic 80 movement, date window, mesh bracelet.

MacBook Pro
Silver aluminum laptop, angled view showing Apple logo on lid and keyboard visibl

Aquafina Water Bottle
Single-serve plastic water bottle with blue Aquafina label, approximately 16-20 oz

Apple AirPods Pro
White wireless earbuds with charging case, standard Apple design with black speaker mesh.

Ello Insulated Tumbler
Cream/beige tall insulated water bottle with flip-top cap, approximately 20 oz capacity

Beats Studio Headphones
Black over-ear wireless headphones with gray accents, padded ear cups and adjustable headband

Leather Jacket
Brown/tan genuine leather jacket with classic biker or bomber style, button-up front, multiple pockets

Wallet
Brown leather bifold or tri-fold wallet with card slots and coin pocket, standard men's or women's design.
